2606.28447.title: SemFlowRAG: Directed Semantic Flow from Abstraction to Evidence for Complex Reasoning
2606.28447.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhanced by Knowledge Graphs has shown promise in complex multi-hop reasoning tasks. However, existing graph-based retrieval methods typically rely on flat, undirected topologies. During the retrieval process, the probability flow often gets trapped in high-degree abstract concept nodes which we define as ``probability black holes'', leading to semantic drift and noise accumulation. To address this, we propose SemFlowRAG, a framework that reconstructs the flat retrieval space into a corpus-adaptive semantic gradient graph. This data-driven self-organization enables a hierarchical structure to emerge naturally from the data distribution, capturing the intrinsic semantic granularity of the corpus to suppress structural noise. By quantifying the semantic abstractness of entities through the embedding variance of their associated passages, we transform static undirected edges into directed semantic constraints. Furthermore, we design an abstractness-guided directed PageRank algorithm that forces the retrieval trajectory to follow a ``high-to-low semantic abstractness'' gradient. This mechanism ensures layer-by-layer evidence convergence, smoothly guiding the retrieval process from abstract concepts to specific document evidence. Extensive experiments on complex QA datasets demonstrate that SemFlowRAG effectively mitigates the ``probability black holes'' issue, outperforming existing baselines in both retrieval and downstream reasoning performance.
2606.28447.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）透過知識圖譜的強化在複雜的多跳推理任務中顯示出潛力。<lb/>然而，現有的基於圖形的檢索方法通常依賴於平坦的無向拓撲。<lb/>在檢索過程中，概率流經常被困在高度抽象概念節點中，我們將其定義為「概率黑洞」，這導致語義漂移和噪聲累積。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了SemFlowRAG，一個將平坦檢索空間重構為語料庫自適應語義梯度圖的框架。<lb/>這種數據驅動的自我組織使得層次結構能夠自然地從數據分佈中出現，捕捉語料庫的內在語義粒度，以抑制結構噪聲。<lb/>通過量化實體的語義抽象性，透過其相關段落的嵌入方差，我們將靜態無向邊轉變為有向語義約束。<lb/>此外，我們設計了一種以抽象性為導向的有向PageRank算法，強迫檢索軌跡遵循「高到低語義抽象性」的梯度。<lb/>這一機制確保了逐層證據的收斂，平滑地引導檢索過程從抽象概念到具體文檔證據。<lb/>在複雜的問答數據集上進行的大量實驗表明，SemFlowRAG有效地緩解了「概率黑洞」問題，在檢索和下游推理性能上均超越了現有基準。
2606.28447.author: Houyuan Qin et.al.
2606.28447.authors: Houyuan Qin, Rong Wu, Qinyuan Qin, Botian Shi, Jingjing Qu, Yang Sun, Pinlong Cai
